content.cn_text: Visitor：你好，我听说了 Upper Provence Folk Festival，我有兴趣参加。
content.en_text: Visitor: Hi there, I heard about the Upper Provence Folk Festival and I'm interested in attending.

content.cn_text: 今年什么时候举办？
content.en_text: When is it happening this year?

content.cn_text: Staff：今年的 Upper Provence Folk Festival 将在六月的一个周末举行。
content.en_text: Staff: This year's Upper Provence Folk Festival will be held on a weekend in June.

content.cn_text: 传统上，它一直是在五月举行。
content.en_text: Traditionally, it has always been held in May.

content.cn_text: Visitor：这太好了。
content.en_text: Visitor: That's great to know.

content.cn_text: 我打算带孩子一起去。
content.en_text: I'm planning to bring my kids along.

content.cn_text: 一个14岁，另一个13岁。
content.en_text: One is 14 years old and the other is 13 years old.

content.cn_text: Staff：不好意思，他们需要买票。
content.en_text: Staff: I'm sorry, but they need to purchase tickets.

content.cn_text: 只有12岁或以下的儿童可以免费参加这个活动。
content.en_text: Only children aged 12 or younger can participate in this event for free.

content.cn_text: Visitor：太好了。
content.en_text: Visitor: Wonderful.

content.cn_text: 节日具体在哪里举行？
content.en_text: Where exactly is the festival taking place?

content.cn_text: Staff：节日将在 Donaldson Farm 举行。
content.en_text: Staff: The festival will be held at Donaldson Farm.

content.cn_text: 农场主人是一位音乐爱好者，慷慨赞助了这次活动。
content.en_text: The owner, who is a music lover, has graciously sponsored this event.

content.cn_text: 我给你拼一下名字，方便你找到它。
content.en_text: I'll spell the name for you to help you locate it.
D-O-N-A-L-S-O-N. D-O-N-A-L-S-O-N。

content.cn_text: Visitor：听起来是个很完美的地点。
content.en_text: Visitor: That sounds like a perfect location.

content.cn_text: 我怎样购买节日门票？
content.en_text: How can I purchase tickets for the festival?

content.cn_text: Staff：要参加这个活动，你需要购买一张组合票，它允许你
content.en_text: Staff: To participate in the event, you will need to purchase a combined ticket that allows you

content.cn_text: 参加所有活动。
content.en_text: access to all activities.

content.cn_text: 分别购买每项活动的单张票累积起来会产生很高费用。
content.en_text: Buying single tickets for each activity separately can result in significant fees when accumulated.

content.cn_text: Visitor：明白了，节日的日程是什么？
content.en_text: Visitor: I see, what is the schedule for the festival?

content.cn_text: 我应该什么时候到？
content.en_text: When should I arrive?

content.cn_text: Staff：节日计划在星期六开始，但露营服务是先到先得。
content.en_text: Staff: The festival is scheduled to start on Saturday, but the camping service is provided on a first
come, first served basis.

content.cn_text: 建议星期四到达，以确保你的露营位置。
content.en_text: It is recommended to arrive on Thursday to secure your camping spot.

content.cn_text: Visitor：知道了。
content.en_text: Visitor: Good to know.

content.cn_text: 露营时还有什么需要注意的吗？
content.en_text: Is there anything else I should be aware of while camping?

content.cn_text: Staff：强烈建议你带一盏灯，因为晚上会非常黑，
content.en_text: Staff: It is strongly recommended to bring a light with you as it can get very dark at night

content.cn_text: 确保孩子安全很重要。
content.en_text: and it's important to ensure the safety of your children.

content.cn_text: Visitor：谢谢你的建议。
content.en_text: Visitor: Thank you for the advice.

content.cn_text: 有给孩子的特别活动吗？
content.en_text: Are there any special activities for children?

content.cn_text: Staff：有，我们为儿童提供很多选择，包括篝火合唱和自然徒步。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, we have a wide range of options for children, including campfire singalongs and nature walks.

content.cn_text: 其中一个亮点是孩子们有机会在最后一晚参加一场音乐会，在那里
content.en_text: One of the highlights is the opportunity for children to attend a concert on the last night, where

content.cn_text: 他们甚至可以和专业音乐家一起演奏音乐。
content.en_text: they can even perform music with professional musicians.

content.cn_text: 所以如果你愿意，可以带乐器。
content.en_text: So you can bring your musical instruments if you want.

content.cn_text: Visitor：这很不错。
content.en_text: Visitor: That's good to know.

content.cn_text: 我们应该带哪些必需品？
content.en_text: What are some essential items we should bring?

content.cn_text: Staff：需要带的一些必需品包括防晒霜。
content.en_text: Staff: Some essential items to bring include sunscreen.

content.cn_text: 露营通常意味着会花大量时间待在户外，暴露在阳光
content.en_text: Camping often involves spending a significant amount of time outdoors exposed to the sun's

content.cn_text: 照射下。
content.en_text: rays.

content.cn_text: 保护皮肤很重要。
content.en_text: It is important to protect your skin.

content.cn_text: Visitor：听起来很有趣。
content.en_text: Visitor: That sounds like a lot of fun.

content.cn_text: 如果有人在节日期间受伤或感觉不舒服怎么办？
content.en_text: If someone gets injured or feels unwell during the festival.

content.cn_text: Staff：营地里的急救站可以处理轻伤、蚊虫叮咬和头痛。
content.en_text: Staff: The emergency station in the camp can handle minor injuries, mosquito bites and headaches.

content.cn_text: 不过，如果参与者有过敏或哮喘，应自带药物。
content.en_text: However, participants should bring their own medicine if they have allergies or asthma.

content.cn_text: Visitor：现场有医疗专业人员吗？
content.en_text: Visitor: Is there a medical professional available on site?

content.cn_text: Staff：有，会一直有一名护士在场。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, there will be a nurse available at all times.

content.cn_text: 如果你的孩子不舒服或有小病，可以咨询她。
content.en_text: You can consult her if your children feel uncomfortable or have ailments.

content.cn_text: 另外，露营区还聘请了一名医生作为顾问，他会在
content.en_text: Additionally, the camping area has hired a doctor as a consultant who will be located

content.cn_text: 附近镇上。
content.en_text: in the nearby town.

content.cn_text: 只有在需要处理复杂医疗状况时，医生才会出现在营地。
content.en_text: The doctor will be present in the camp only when there is a need to address complicated
medical conditions.

content.cn_text: Visitor：非常感谢你回答我所有问题。
content.en_text: Visitor: Thank you so much for answering all my questions.

content.cn_text: Staff：不客气。
content.en_text: Staff: You're welcome.

content.cn_text: 如果你还有任何问题或需要进一步帮助，随时联系。
content.en_text: If you have any more questions or need further assistance, feel free to reach out.

content.cn_text: 我们随时提供帮助。祝你享受节日。
content.en_text: We're here to help. Enjoy the festival.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: Date of the event: one weekend in 1. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 Date of the event: one weekend in ______。原文说今年会在 June 的一个周末举行，所以答案是 June。May 是传统举办月份，不是今年答案。

items.title: Entrance fee: free for children under 2. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Entrance fee: free for children under ______。原文说 children aged 12 or younger 免费，所以答案是 12。13 和 14 岁需要买票。

items.title: Location: 3. __________ farm
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Location: ______ farm。原文地点是 Donaldson Farm，并拼写为 D-O-N-A-L-S-O-N，所以答案是 DONALSON。

items.title: A combined 4. __________ enables you to participate in all activities.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 A combined ______ enables you to participate in all activities。原文说 combined ticket，所以答案是 ticket。

items.title: Come on 5. __________ to guarantee a spot
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 Come on ______ to guarantee a spot。原文说建议 Thursday 到达以确保 camping spot，所以答案是 Thursday。Saturday 是节日开始时间，不是抢露营位的建议到达日。

items.title: A 6. __________ for nighttime
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 Items to bring: A ______ for nighttime。原文说 bring a light，因为晚上很黑，所以答案是 light。

items.title: Instruments for a 7. __________ with professional musicians if you like
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 Instruments for a ______ with professional musicians。原文说 children can attend a concert and perform with professional musicians，所以答案是 concert。

items.title: 8. __________ for outdoor activities
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 outdoor activities 需要带什么。原文说 essential items include sunscreen，因为户外会晒太阳，所以答案是 sunscreen。

items.title: Capable of treating injuries, mosquito bites as well as 9. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问急救站可以治疗 injuries、mosquito bites 以及什么。原文说 headaches，所以答案是 headaches。allergies/asthma 需要自带药，是干扰。

items.title: Contact a 10. __________ if children feel unwell
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 children feel unwell 时联系谁。原文说会一直有 nurse，并且孩子不舒服可以 consult her，所以答案是 nurse。
